title: Context Selection, Compression, Deduplication, and Position · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved trace contains a plausible citation-mapped context assembler with one ingestion, normalization, chunking, lexical, embedding, index, filter, fusion, reranking, context, generation, citation, authorization, latency, or recovery defect; identify the first failed stage before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in citation-mapped context assembler and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory,…
objectives: Allocate tokens across instructions, query, history, evidence, citation metadata, answer, and safety reserves before assembly.
Collapse duplicate and overlapping chunks while retaining source diversity, conflicting versions, amendments, and dissent evidence.
Compare extractive selection, sentence filtering, summaries, and structured compression against retained claim and citation evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

steps.title: RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Context Citation Map
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: rag-context-citation-map-vbk0zr" that uses case 4334 to deduplicate, compress, order, and citation-map context within a measured token budget. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import third-party packages, load models, open files or sockets, contact vector databases or provider APIs, read credentials or host state, execute commands, or cause external effects; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, pinned native packages, evaluated models, disposable data and indexes, controlled services, load, fault, recovery, security, accessibility, and production gates.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Context Citation Map.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Rag Context Citation Map into observable performance evidence. For RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Context Citation Map, keep Rag Context Citation Map connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-context-citation-map-vbk0zr
# Competency: rag-context-citation-map.
# Case 4334: a multimodal maintenance-manual release.
# Operating constraint: preserve source provenance, tenant authorization, deletion, freshness, citation offsets, and untrusted-data separation.
# Changed case: move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice.
def evidence_rag_context_citation_map_vbk0zr(candidate_tokens: int = 6400, context_budget: int = 2200, selected_tokens: int = 1800, duplicate_chunks: int = 1, citation_links: int = 6, order_tested: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_vbk0zr = "vbk0zr-rz0kbv-4334"
    assert evidence_variant_vbk0zr
    evidence_axes_vbk0zr = (
        "corpusvbk0zr",
        "queryrz0kbv",
        "tenant4334",
        "indexvbk0zr4334",
        "promptrz0kbv4334",
        "evaluation4334vbk0zr",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_vbk0zr)) == 6
    if min(candidate_tokens, context_budget, selected_tokens) < 0:
        return False, selected_tokens, "token-accounting"
    if selected_tokens > context_budget or context_budget > candidate_tokens:
        return False, selected_tokens, "context-budget"
    if duplicate_chunks < 0 or citation_links < 1:
        return False, citation_links, "context-identity"
    if not order_tested:
        return False, citation_links, "position-bias"
    retained = selected_tokens - duplicate_chunks * 100
    assert retained >= 0
    return True, retained, "citation-mapped-context"
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
